COSMOS Organic by Ecocert
Learn more about COSMOS Organic by Ecocert

COSMOS Organic by Ecocert

COSMOS Organic by Ecocert certifies beauty care products that contain 95% organic plant ingredients and at least 10-20% organic ingredients in the total formula for rinse-off or leave-on products. A product with this certification does not contain synthetic colours, dyes, or fragrances, genetically modified ingredients, and is not tested on animals.

Learn more about COSMOS Organic by Ecocert

COSMOS Organic by Ecocert

COSMOS Organic by Ecocert certifies beauty care products that contain 95% organic plant ingredients and at least 10-20% organic ingredients in the total formula for rinse-off or leave-on products. A product with this certification does not contain synthetic colours, dyes, or fragrances, genetically modified ingredients, and is not tested on animals.
Safer chemicals
Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.

COSMOS Organic by Ecocert

COSMOS Organic by Ecocert certifies beauty care products that contain 95% organic plant ingredients and at least 10-20% organic ingredients in the total formula for rinse-off or leave-on products. A product with this certification does not contain synthetic colours, dyes, or fragrances, genetically modified ingredients, and is not tested on animals.
